appliedUpdates.description: Confirmed validation surface at http://localhost:5173, agent-browser as testing tool, max concurrent validators: 5

notes.VAL-DASH-004: Coverage gap percentage correctly calculated using formula (Unprotected/Total)×100, rounded to 1 decimal. Zero total case displays '0.0%'.
notes.VAL-ONB-009: Onboarding completion persists policy selection in localStorage. Page refresh correctly skips onboarding and shows main view.
notes.VAL-PS-004: Policy selection persists across page refreshes. Selected policy stored in localStorage under 'insurescope_policyType' key.
